MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: Cognitive load ratings for multiple experimental tasks across three sessions.

participant_id.Description: Unique participant ID that matches the participant_id in participants.tsv.

sess-01_Nback.LongName: Session 01 N-back task cognitive load score
sess-01_Nback.Description: Cognitive load score for the N-back task in session 01. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-01_Arithmetic.LongName: Session 01 arithmetic task cognitive load score
sess-01_Arithmetic.Description: Cognitive load score for the arithmetic task in session 01. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-01_MotorImagery.LongName: Session 01 motor imagery task cognitive load score
sess-01_MotorImagery.Description: Cognitive load score for the motor imagery task in session 01. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-01_PassiveMotor.LongName: Session 01 passive motor task cognitive load score
sess-01_PassiveMotor.Description: Cognitive load score for the passive motor task in session 01. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-01_NbackArithmetic.LongName: Session 01 dual N-back plus arithmetic task cognitive load score
sess-01_NbackArithmetic.Description: Cognitive load score for the dual N-back plus arithmetic task in session 01. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-01_ActiveMotor.LongName: Session 01 active motor task cognitive load score
sess-01_ActiveMotor.Description: Cognitive load score for the active motor task in session 01. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-01_Full.Description: Composite cognitive load score across all tasks in session 01. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-02_Nback.LongName: Session 02 N-back task cognitive load score
sess-02_Nback.Description: Cognitive load score for the N-back task in session 02. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-02_Arithmetic.Description: Cognitive load score for the arithmetic task in session 02. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-02_MotorImagery.Description: Cognitive load score for the motor imagery task in session 02. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-02_PassiveMotor.LongName: Session 02 passive motor task cognitive load score
sess-02_PassiveMotor.Description: Cognitive load score for the passive motor task in session 02. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-02_NbackArithmetic.LongName: Session 02 dual N-back plus arithmetic task cognitive load score
sess-02_NbackArithmetic.Description: Cognitive load score for the dual N-back plus arithmetic task in session 02. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-02_ActiveMotor.LongName: Session 02 active motor task cognitive load score
sess-02_ActiveMotor.Description: Cognitive load score for the active motor task in session 02. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-02_Full.Description: Composite cognitive load score across all tasks in session 02. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-03_Nback.Description: Cognitive load score for the N-back task in session 03. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-03_Arithmetic.LongName: Session 03 arithmetic task cognitive load score
sess-03_Arithmetic.Description: Cognitive load score for the arithmetic task in session 03. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-03_MotorImagery.Description: Cognitive load score for the motor imagery task in session 03. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-03_PassiveMotor.Description: Cognitive load score for the passive motor task in session 03. Higher values indicate higher load.

sess-03_NbackArithmetic.LongName: Session 03 dual N-back plus arithmetic task cognitive load score
sess-03_NbackArithmetic.Description: Cognitive load score for the dual N-back plus arithmetic task in session 03. Higher values indicate higher load.
